programme.title: Bob's Burgers

programme.title: Schitt's Creek

programme.desc: Michael trades in his bicycle for his father's car and ends up giving a ride to a complete stranger who mistakes Michael for a killer. Lucille tries to upstage her rival, Lucille, at a bachelorette auction.

programme.title: Arrested Development
programme.desc: Michael sets up an "intimate conjugal visit" for his parents, while it is revealed that George Sr. had an affair with Kitty, his secretary who recently slept with Gob. Tobias and Lindsay see a marriage counselor.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: we discover that Charlie got molested in elementary school by his teacher when the teacher gets put on trial. programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia

Jack confronts Gaines who, realizing he has failed Drazen's assignment, chooses death over helping Jack. Back at CTU, Nina and Tony interrogate the mother of the traitor and learn of a secret bank account containing deposits from Belgrade. They also learn that additional assassins may be making their way to Los Angeles.

While Jack is questioned at the CTU, Teri and Kim are taken to the clinic to be examined. Meanwhile, certain he recognizes the name Jack Bauer, Palmer has Jack's background investigated. When he discovers that Jack was the sole survivor of a secret mission that he authorized two years ago, Palmer becomes convinced Jack is out for revenge and insists on talking to Jack face to face.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder is on the manhunt for a Vietnam veteran who can project his consciousness into other people's minds to kill them. Mulder and Agent Krycek try to uncover the conspiracy behind the killer's powers.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: Mulder is called to a hostage situation involving Duane Barry, a former FBI Agent who claims to be an alien abductee and wants to get back to the abduction site with someone who will be taken instead of him. Unfortunately, the someone he eventually chooses is Scully.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Coach becomes a youth league baseball coach. But his competitive nature turns him from lovable guy to angry tyrant. Cliff gets a raise and treats Norm to dinner. Carla brings her newborn to Cheers for breastfeeding.

programme.desc: Sam and Diane go to work after Dick Cavett suggests that Sam's autobiography might sell and Norm confronts an old flame of Vera's who's interested in her again.

programme.desc: Fran directs Grace's school production until Maxwell takes over.

programme.title: 3rd Rock from the Sun
programme.desc: Dr. Albright goes on holiday and Dick feels very lonely without her being around. programme.title: 3rd Rock from the Sun
programme.desc: When an obnoxious professor dies during a party in his honor, Dick finds the will specifies that he must deliver a “forthright and honest” eulogy about the universally despised academic. Tommy neglects his female pal August to hit it off with an “easy” cheerleader.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After witnessing a woman give birth, Niles decides it's time to practice his parenting skills -- on a sack of flour!

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles interpret their father's invitation to join him and his drinking buddies at Duke's as a rite of passage. However, their spirits fall when Frasier and Niles realise they are investors in the company that plans to demolish the beloved bar to erect a mini-mall.

programme.title: Frasier

programme.title: Escape to the Country

programme.title: Escape to the Country

programme.desc: There's a mole in the precinct and Holt and Jake need to find out who it is before Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch gets wind of it. Meanwhile, Terry and Rosa visit a "silent" disco to uncover new leads for their new drug task force.

programme.desc: Jake hits it off with a woman at a bar, but later finds out she is the attorney for a perp he is trying to put in jail. Meanwhile, Gina and Charles work to put their relationship behind them, and Amy is pressured into running for union rep.

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Leslie goes all out to save a gazebo at a mansion on the historical register from being destroyed, while April gets in trouble with Ron when she accidentally schedules 93 meetings for him on the same day.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Tina attends a convention based on an animated show about ponies and finds that many of the fans are middle-aged men; when Tina is tricked out of her rare pony toy, Bob goes under cover to get it back.

programme.desc: When the gang learns that they are in danger of losing their bar due to a zoning mishap, they resort to some outlandish and extreme methods to prevent that from happening. Meanwhile, Frank isn’t too happy when his wife returns to town.

programme.desc: Carmen tells her parents she wants to start dating, and she brings home a boy from her school for them to meet. Everything about Jason seems to be perfect, except that he and Carmen don't want to go out in public together.

programme.desc: Upset that Martin is actively endorsing (and appearing in a commercial for) a right-wing congressional candidate, Frasier decides to get behind his opponent, but becomes conflicted about it when his candidate reveals something personal to him.

programme.desc: Brennan and Booth stumble upon a subterranean world of homeless people when they find the remains of a filmmaker in the ventilation shaft of an underground tunnel.

programme.sub-title: Mr. Monk Goes to the Theater

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.sub-title: Work Hard or Die Trying, Girl
programme.desc: Gene tries to make one of his dreams a reality when he gets the opportunity to make a musical version of Die Hard at the Wagstaff Fall Festival.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Tina begins an out-of-this-world romance with a ghost that is believed to be living in the Belcher's basement.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Bob becomes Teddy's workout buddy after finding out his burgers contributed to Teddy's bad health. The two enroll in a stuntman boot camp where their friendship is put to the test. programme.title: MasterChef Canada

programme.title: Suits

programme.title: The Ricky Gervais Show
programme.desc: Ricky and Stephen challenge Karl's interpretations of famous sayings such as, "People who live in glass houses shouldn't throw stones." Stephen questions Karl on what he's learned since his New Year's resolution to learn something new every day.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny considers running for town council. David and Stevie look for love. Alexis copes with being single.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Johnny gets thrown into the raw milk business. Moira tries to connect with the townspeople. David gives style advice.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Robin is nominated to receive an award for a news report and everyone needs a date to take to the show. Barney introduces Ted to Mary as a date that Ted can take to the show. Originally Ted is opposed to the idea of just trying to save face in front of Robin but when she shows up with a date he changes his mind. Robin asks Mary lots of questions, and Ted begins to really like Mary, despite her occupation.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: When Jake repeats to Judith something Charlie said, she refuses to let Alan take Jake for the weekend. Alan tries to talk to Judith, but encounters resistance from her and her friends. It's up to Charlie to set things right.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is sure he isn't ready for fatherhood after a year of trying to raise Jake, so he opts to have a vasectomy. But when the doctor performing the procedure keeps getting calls from his wife, who's about to give birth, Charlie starts to think about what fatherhood might entail and likes the idea, provided he still has his vital organs intact... in more ways than one.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men
programme.desc: Charlie is having some friends over to his house for a gathering but Alan is not invited. Things get worse for Alan when he is also not invited to Judith's party even though her guests are Alan's friends.

Jack learns that one of the assassins, Alexis Mecir, is actually Victor Drazen's son and has become intimate with one of Palmer's aides. In an attempt to find the man ordering the assassinations, the aide agrees to plant a tracking device in Alexis' wallet. Back at the safe house, Teri and Kim discover their location is no longer secret or safe.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.sub-title: There But For the Grace of God
programme.desc: An alien artifact transports Daniel to an alternate reality, where he is not a part of the Stargate program and the Goa'uld -- led by Teal'c -- are invading Earth.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Princess Leia Fantasy
programme.desc: Ross reveals a fantasy to Rachel involving a certain "Star Wars" character. Monica suffers from insomnia after her breakup with Richard. And Chandler, back together with Janice, wants Joey to bond with her.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where No One's Ready
programme.desc: In a race against the clock, a stressed Ross tries to get the gang dressed and ready for a black-tie benefit at the museum while Joey and Chandler clash over personal belongings and personal space.

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe dates a man who thinks he's stalking her twin sister. Ross and Rachel give Chandler "boyfriend" lessons. Monica decides the best way to get over Richard is to keep herself busy, so she uses her free time to make jam and considers insemination via a sperm bank.

programme.title: The X-Files
programme.desc: While Agent Scully is still missing, Agent Mulder embarks upon an investigation involving vampires in Los Angeles, subsequently becoming involved with a sultry female vampire who yearns to escape her lifestyle.

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: On Halloween, Buffy and her friends patronize an unusual costume shop where customers turn into whatever costume they are wearing.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam and Diane want to spend some time alone together, but the lonely Coach keeps joining them, not realising he is spoiling things for them. Rather than hurt his feelings by asking him not to bother them, Sam and Diane decide to set him up with a woman so they will be left in piece.

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff's know-it-all attitude finally gets him into a fight with another patron.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie's (Leah Remini) friend Susie (played by Melissa Samuels) and her husband Mike (played by Ben Bode) are over for dinner at the Heffernan's and Carrie invites them to spend Thanksgiving weekend with them. Doug (Kevin James) hates her husband, so he convinces Spence (Patton Oswalt) to move out and stay with them so Carrie's friends can't.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug's bowling team bowls just for fun and is financially supported by the local ale house, but now they threaten to no longer support them if they continue to be on a constant losing streak. Doug soon realizes Carrie is the problem so he removes her from the team making for an awkward household.

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie wants to invest Doug's Christmas bonus; Arthur competes with the neighbors about who has the largest yard decoration.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc:
This year, Angie decides that her and George should just get something cheap and from the heart for their anniversary. This gives Vic an opening to convince George to help him smuggle his brother Ontovio out of Cuba.
Meanwhile, Max has a fake birthday party to get free presents.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.sub-title: Would You Like a Drumstick or a Kidney?
programme.desc: After inviting his extended family to Thanksgiving dinner, George learns his estranged father needs a new kidney.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: George gets rid of some of Angie's cherished mementos as he prepares to donate a kidney.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: At Christmastime, George will stop at nothing to convince Max to continue believing in Santa Claus.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Martin bemoans his sons' rarefied tastes and avoidance of all that is ordinary, they try to prove him wrong by fixing the toilet; they make the problem worse, call in a plumber, and find that they've hired Danny Kriezel (John McGinley), a bully who tormented Niles long ago.

programme.title: Hell's Kitchen (US)
programme.sub-title: When the Wall Comes Tumbling Down

Then, it's survival of the fittest when they face the Signature Dish challenge and their first dinner service, during which they cook for VIP guests Nolan Gould and Erica Ash.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a London couple find a perfect rural escape in Cornwall that would enable them to live the 'good life'. On a budget of £400,000, can Jules deliver? Away from the property hunt, Jules explores Cornwall's most southerly tip.

programme.title: Kitchen Nightmares (US)
programme.desc: Chef Ramsey heads to St. Clair Shores, Michigan, to visit Jack's Waterfront, which is suffering from a lack of fresh seafood and an inattentive management. Chef's goal is to make this eatery a year-round money maker, but the general manager's excessive socializing with his patrons may put a roadblock in this plan.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Boyle go on a stakeout and tensions rise between the two, Rosa shows interest in Holt's nephew, and Terry writes a book for his daughters. Santiago and Gina are displeased when they assume the characters in the book are based on them.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The team is excited to spend the weekend at Charles' beach house for a detectives-only-getaway, until Jake ruins the fun by inviting Captain Holt. Meanwhile, Charles helps Rosa send romantic texts to her new boyfriend (guest star Nick Cannon), and Gina tries to get Amy drunk, simply for her own enjoyment.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mitchell tries to tell Cameron how he feels uncomfortable with his mom, Barb Tucker. Meanwhile, Haley breaks up with Dylan much to Phil's dismay and Claire's delight. Jay has a little stomach ache that gets exacerbated when he and Manny look it up on the Internet.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: At Luke and Manny's first school dance, Jay and Phil take them to the mall which turns disastrous, Claire's happiness turns into jealousy when Gloria joins the school dance committee. Meanwhile, Cameron and Mitchell learn about Lily biting other kids at the playground.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: After Ron breaks up with Tom's ex-wife, he decides to get back together with his Tammy, much to everyone's horror. Meanwhile, Leslie and Ben try to get the local police to donate their services to the upcoming Harvest Festival.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Leslie hits the Pawnee media circuit to promote the Harvest Festival, but Ben freaks out on air when his past is exposed. Meanwhile, April threatens Andy that she'll leave for Indianapolis unless he does her chores.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: While on vacation, Angela's boyfriend goes missing . The investigation leads the team to a violent boyfriend, the local sheriff and ultimately to a counterfeiting ring setup in the desert.

programme.title: Monk
programme.sub-title: Mr. Monk and the Sleeping Suspect
programme.desc: Monk knows who is behind a string of mail bombs that have been exploding around San Francisco. The only problem is his primary suspect... is in a coma.

programme.title: House
programme.desc: House is convinced a black presidential candidate has AIDS, but the senator's passion convinces him otherwise. Also, Vogler forces House to give a speech endorsing a new drug from Vogler's company, but House has plans of his own. Clinic Cases: A woman showing signs of having had a miscarriage claims she's not having sex despite a hickey and carpet burns on her backside.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: While Bob is boycotting the holiday, Linda and the kids spend Thanksgiving at the First Annual Fischoeder Turk-tacular Turkey Town Festival. However, a wild bird attack leads to total mayhem.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Bob enters a burger-making contest, only to discover that his distinguishing ingredient is missing! To help out their dad, the kids go on a mission to find the ever-so-important black garlic.

programme.title: Bob's Burgers
programme.desc: Bob and his dad, "Big Bob", try to outdo each other in the kitchen when they rehash an old argument at Big Bob's Christmas party. Meanwhile, the kids compete to get the best present for Bob.

programme.title: 28 Days Later
programme.desc: Twenty-eight days after a killer virus was accidentally unleashed from a British research facility, a small group of London survivors are caught in a desperate struggle to protect themselves from the infected. Carried by animals and humans, the virus turns those it infects into homicidal maniacs -- and it's absolutely impossible to contain.

programme.title: Schitt's Creek
programme.desc: Moira is worried that racy photos from her past will jeopardize the campaign; Johnny asks for financial help; Alexis gets a job.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Lily, Barney and Robin attend a high school prom to scout out a potential band for Lily and Marshall's wedding reception. programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: It's Ted's 28th birthday and he still keeps looking for the perfect girl. Apparently he is about to find her since the matchmaker he once hired to find him a partner has finally found the perfect match. When he is about to meet her, Lily calls him because she is in trouble. Marshall gets himself into an office war between Barney and some guy named "Clark Butterfield" in which the guys do all kinds of gross things to each other.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver talks about the current practices of overturning wrongful convictions and how it is quite unsupportive of even apparently innocent people. He advocates for urgent reforms in the flawed system which is clearly not working in favor of the innocents. Plus, the heroic resistance of Ukrainians against the invasion of Russia.

programme.title: Friends

programme.desc: Ross and Chandler discover a section of the library where students go to have sex. Monica and Chandler run into Janice and she invites herself to the wedding. They try to avoid her. Meanwhile, Rachel and Phoebe befriend Joey's girlfriend.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver explains why concert tickets are so expensive, who’s making money off of them, and which One Direction is his favorite. Plus, the introduction of some appalling anti-LGBT laws in several states.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: After Glenn has a health scare, Dina takes control of his nutrition and fitness. Jonah and Cheyenne try to get Amy to take a break from working too hard, while Mateo interviews for a new position in the store.

programme.title: The Middle

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: As Sheldon presses Leonard and Penny to set a wedding date, he encounters major changes in his own relationship with Amy. Meanwhile, Raj contemplates breaking up with Emily, and Howard and Bernadette struggle with asking Stuart to move out of their house.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Marshall suspects that he is the reason Lily can't get pregnant after meeting a fertility doctor who also happens to be Barney's doppelganger. Meanwhile, Robin's embarrassing past is revealed at work by her former co-anchor.

programme.desc: Ross drives himself insane when he can't name all 50 states in a simple game. Tag joins the gang for Thanksgiving dinner, where Joey accidentally spills the beans about Rachel's crush on him. Phoebe sneaks a dog into the apartment, making Chandler extremely nervous.

programme.title: 30 Rock
programme.desc: Angie's reality show visits "TGS", resulting in a red-faced situation for Jack, Jenna pining for attention, and Liz leading a scheme to lure Tracy back from Africa. Meanwhile, Frank reconnects with a lost love.

programme.title: New Girl
programme.desc: When Jess is served a restraining order by her ex-boyfriend, Sam, she sets out to clear her name with Winstons help. Nick and Schmidt plot against the owner of a trendy new bar that opened on their street.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Leslie accompanies Ben on a trip to his hometown which has offered him a key to the city. Ron deals with a lawsuit filed against him by Councilman Jamm. Ann and Chris take a parenting compatibility quiz.

programme.title: George Lopez
programme.desc: Rather than give in to Benny's incessant pleas to buy her a new car, George and Angie agree to drive her around town just to get her out of the house. So, when George picks Benny and her friends up after a wild night on the town, her insensitive wisecracks and his temper gets him into a bit of trouble of his own.

programme.title: Archer (2009)
programme.desc: Deep in space, Archer and the crew encounter a terrifying cosmic beast. Even deeper, they encounter a self-aggrandizing life coach.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: The gang tries to support Marshall and Lily tries to help his mom during Marshall's father's funeral, but Marshall becomes preoccupied when he discovers that he has one final voicemail message from him.

programme.title: Johnny English
programme.desc: A lowly pencil pusher working for MI7, Johnny English is suddenly promoted to super spy after Agent One is assassinated and every other agent is blown up at his funeral. When a billionaire entrepreneur sponsors the exhibition of the Crown Jewels—and the valuable gems disappear on the opening night and on English's watch—the newly-designated agent must jump into action to find the thief and recover the missing gems.

programme.title: The Goldbergs (2013)
programme.desc: Beverly scores a bargain on four paintings. Once they make it home, she and Adam determine something supernatural is causing them to be destroyed. Their confrontation leads to a visit to the dean's office.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver explains how truck drivers get paid, how they often don’t, and how companies exploit them to increase profits. Plus, Republican congressman Madison Cawthorn's tales of GOP orgies and drug use has him in trouble with his own party.

programme.title: Community
programme.desc: Jeff organizes a lovely holiday gathering at his apartment but Annie secretly invites Professor Cornwallis, to get in his good graces. When it becomes apparent that Professor Cornwallis intends to give them a bad grade on their joint history paper, the atmosphere quickly deteriorates and the group takes decisive action.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.desc: After an electric heating blanket shorts out while the gang watches the Wiz they look in the mirror and realize they've turned black. They have to figure out how to get back to being themselves by going through all the classic body switch movie shenanigans they encounter.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Gina attend their 20th high school reunion. Back at the Nine-Nine, Charles helps Rosa with her love life.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver

programme.title: The Middle
programme.desc: Aunt Edie has died and the Hecks take a train to South Dakota to take her body to its final resting place but during the trip, Axl feels guilty for causing her death earlier; Brick tries to follow Aunt Edies example of living life freely.

programme.title: The Office (US)
programme.desc: With Andy's sales at his lowest ever, he gets desperate and holds a small business seminar with the help of some special guests. Michael and Holly turn the event into an improv challenge. Meanwhile, Erin enlists some of her co-workers in her scrabble battle with Gabe.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Sal and Q bark up the wrong tree while posing as employees for a pet store. They then head to the market for a game that throws everything up in the air. Tonight's big loser virtually loses his mind after entering a world he's never visited.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny struggles with Leonard's confession that he kissed another woman as they prepare to get married in Las Vegas. Meanwhile, Sheldon doesn't know what to do after Amy pushes pause on their relationship.

programme.title: The Goldbergs (2013)
programme.desc: Murray buys WrestleMania tickets to spend time with Barry and Adam, but he buys fake tickets and they can't get in; Beverly forms her own neighborhood watch group when the Frentas decide neighbor Jane Bales will be the watch captain.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Candy
programme.desc: When Monica wants to get to know her neighbors, she decides to make candy, but when the neighbors want candy 24/7, she becomes overwhelmed. When Rachel makes a fake but inappropriate evaluation of Tag, she gets angry with him when he fails to read it and sends it to Human Resources. With the help of Ross, Phoebe learns to ride a bike.

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted discovers that he is in love with Zoey after she tries to set him up on a date with her naive cousin, and he cuts off their friendship as a result. But little does he know that her marriage status has changed and she loves him too.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia
programme.sub-title: The Gang Goes to a Water Park
programme.desc: The gang takes a trip to a local waterpark, ripe with personal agendas and ulterior motives. Dennis feeds off his mantra of "the park provides" and takes on a protégé. Frank and Charlie are determined to ride every ride by any means necessary and Mac and Dee get stuck in a tube slide for most of the day.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver explains the flawed procedure of police interrogations. He says how and why many innocent people get wrongfully convicted for crimes they did not commit. He further explains what needs to be done to punishing innocent people, where the main culprits are out in the open and probably doing more crime. So proper investigation is a must rather than forcing a false confession out of an innocent person to avoid due diligence.

programme.title: 30 Rock
programme.desc: Liz tries to reassure her staff that the show's forced hiatus is temporary, but everyone starts to focus on their fallback plans.Meanwhile, Jack attempts to salvage a cable network by enlisting his nemesis, Devon Banks.

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Holiday Armadillo
programme.desc: Ross's plans to teach Ben about Hanukkah are continually thwarted when the young boy can't get his mind off of Santa. Meanwhile, Phoebe prepares to move back into her refurbished apartment, with or without Rachel. However, she'll stop at nothing to get Rachel to go with her, including buying Joey a drum set. Monica is mystified by Chandler's inability to tip properly.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard confronts the woman he kissed on the North Sea in an attempt to set Penny's mind at ease. Also, Sheldon films a special episode of "Fun with Flags" after his breakup with Amy, and Bernadette feels guilty about withholding a secret from Penny.

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: Amy amps up the store's Halloween spirit to impress the new district manager, even setting up a haunted house that terrifies Glenn. Jonah collects the last of the union cards. Cheyenne and Mateo wonder if any Cloud 9 employees are capable of murder.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything
programme.desc: Adam explains that unregulated food expiration dates lead to waste and that your 401(k) won't be enough to support your retirement. Plus, Adam's girlfriend Melinda proves that even with research, the future is unpredictable.

programme.title: Bruce Almighty
programme.desc: Bruce Nolan, a television reporter in Buffalo, NY, is discontented with almost everything in life despite his popularity and the love of his girlfriend Grace. At the end of the worst day of his life, Bruce angrily ridicules and rages against God and God responds. God appears in human form and, endowing Bruce with divine powers, challenges Bruce to take on the big job to see if he can do it any better.

programme.title: The Ricky Gervais Show
programme.desc: Karl feels he's getting up in age and is starting to spend more time with his doctors. No longer young and free, he thinks about his will, which he believes is a form of charity, though Ricky disagrees. Karl's attorney suggested he marry his girlfriend for tax purposes, which would finally give his parents a reason to meet hers.

programme.title: The Middle
programme.desc: Valentine's Day aims its sights on the Heck kids when a nervous Brick finds out that his quirky girlfriend Cindy wants him to kiss her on the special day, Darrin asks Frankie and Mike to help out with an exciting scavenger hunt he's putting together for Sue, and Axl begins to question his girlfriend Devin's request that he not give her anything for what she considers to be a lame tradition.

programme.title: Last Week Tonight with John Oliver
programme.desc: John Oliver discusses environmental racism, how both government and industry are failing people of color and how zoning is manipulating the same people to live in adverse conditions. Plus, pandas doing some weird things and 'gas math' by Shaquille O'Neal.

programme.title: Parks and Recreation
programme.desc: Leslie decides to give the Animal Control Department a much-needed makeover. Ann tries to get Ron the medical attention he needs. Ben, Tom, and Andy recruit donors for their charity foundation.

programme.title: New Girl

Meanwhile, Schmidt and Cece panic when Winston decides to bring his new prankster girlfriend, Rhonda as his plus one to their wedding.

programme.title: The Great North
